arts.ttl: 'I think': Carlo Ancelotti and Jude Bellingham both say the same thing about Liverpool after losing 2-0
Kylian Mbappe endured a 'true nightmare' against Liverpool, claim Spanish press - with Real Madrid star branded a 'shadow of what he is supposed to be'
arts.sum: Spanish newspaper Marca highlighted how the match at Anfield was an opportunity for Mbappe to thrive in his favoured position, with Vinicius Jr ruled out through injury.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe: The GOOD NEWS for Real Madrid after Liverpool disasterclass
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe: The GOOD NEWS for Real Madrid after Liverpool disasterclass Believe it or not, there is some positive Kylian Mbappe news to emerge from the Frenchman’s woeful performance as Real Madrid were comfortably beaten 2-0 by Liverpool on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid in deep Champions League trouble after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Should they win their remaining games against Atalanta (away), Salzburg (home) and Brest (away ), they would finish on 15 points, giving them a 73% chance of finishing in the top eight, according to calculations carried out by analytics company Opta before the tournament began. arts.sum: Huge exhibition match in Qatar as famous faces return

arts.ttl: Andy Robertson lets slip Liverpool dressing room view on Jamie Carragher Mohamed Salah remark
arts.sum: Carragher said Salah has endangered himself of looking "selfish" with his comments regarding Liverpool contract talks over the weekend.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Liverpool 2 - 0 Real Madrid, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani, Jose Perez, Siddharth Ramsundar, and Mehedi Hassan break down Real Madrid ’s 2 - 0 loss to Liverpool at Anfield: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Rodri hits back at Real Madrid for Ballon d'Or boycott - 'I cannot respect'
arts.sum: Manchester City star Rodri, who retains hope of returning from injury this season, has spoken out against Real Madrid's decision to snub his Ballon d'Or win

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Is A Liability — And The Team Is Working Overtime To Cover Up For His Mistakes
arts.sum: Almost the entire conversation in the build-up to Real Madrid ’s game against Liverpool at Anfield on Wednesday night was about the absence of Vinicius Jr, and what that would mean for Kylian Mbappe. There is very little to get excited about as a Real Madrid fan when Mbappe receives the ball in stride on the left wing, right wing, or down the middle.

arts.ttl: When is Athletic - Real Madrid? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Athletic - Real Madrid will be played on Wednesday December 4 at San Mames, with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT . Real Madrid, currently in second place, suffered a harsh loss against Liverpool in the Champions League and will have to visit Getafe before heading to San Mamés.
